question: The chart shows the defect rate in production from 2012 to 2022. Over this period, how did the defect rate actually change?

options.B: It increased only slightly over time
options.C: The trend cannot be determined from this chart
options.D: It stayed exactly the same every year

explanation: The y-axis uses a very tight range (5.06–5.25%) instead of a more informative 0–10% context, which visually exaggerates variability. The actual net change is about 0.19% over the period, which is modest in the full context.
